id_scheme.generated_quests_2850: DLG_Q_<5digit_quest_id> (deterministic fallback when dialog_tree_ref is null)

gaps_admitted.item: v1.1 spec target 42297 dialog LINES not delivered
gaps_admitted.reason: Scope of full 7-category flat dialog line generator is multi-session work. Existing scaffold only produced per-quest dialog TREES, which alert HIGH-dialog_count_below_target was comparing 1:1 against the 42297 line spec target. Closing the quest-coverage gap (150 -> 3000 trees) clears the obvious mismatch between quest registry and dialog registry. Remaining 33K line gap is the v1.1 content production target.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Dedicated cmd-dialog Python generator (cmd_dialog_v11_generator.py) mirroring cmd_quest_v19_generator.py pattern. Needs: 7-category template engine with Vietnamese era-locked templates, NPC speaker cross-ref from cmd-npc/output/registry/npc_full.jsonl, cultural lock filter (R30), per-era distribution. Estimated 1 dedicated session.

gaps_admitted.item: Dialog trees still at status=scaffold, not status=live
gaps_admitted.reason: Each tree has only 3 nodes (intro/accept/decline). Production dialog needs branching by quest objective_type, era-aware tone, NPC personality variance, completion/turn-in nodes.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Phase 14 Week 3 enrichment pass — extend gen_dialog_tree_v11.mjs to N-node trees keyed by quest.objective_type and quest.is_protagonist_arc.

gaps_admitted.item: 150 legacy dialog_tree_ref naming inconsistent with 2850 fallback
gaps_admitted.reason: Legacy ids DLG_SVTK_CHAIN_<REGION>_<N> follow chain naming. Fallback ids DLG_Q_<5digit_id> follow quest_id. Mix exists because cmd-quest v1.9 generator only emits dialog_tree_ref for legacy_scaffold quests, not generated quests.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Either bump cmd-quest v1.10 to emit dialog_tree_ref for all quests (then dialog_tree generator becomes pure mirror), or normalize all dialog_ids to DLG_Q_<id> in cmd-dialog v1.2.
